potential_missing.source_sentence: After any of these activities, updates are shown, and then it ends.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow users to navigate from the homepage using a navigation bar.
The system shall display information about projects when selected by the user.
The system shall display information about career opportunities when selected by the user.
The system shall check submitted job applications after they are submitted.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote:
A person begins at the homepage and uses the navigation bar to choose what they want to see.
They may look at projects, available departments, the history of the firm, news and blogs, or career opportunities.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to browse different sections such as projects, departments, company history, news, and blogs from the homepage using a navigation bar.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After any of these activities, updates are shown, and then it ends.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall display updates after users have completed their chosen activity.
